There was a scuffle and the Briarwoods absconded back to Whitestone. They sent a couple assassins out to attempt to take out their driver, who was spilling information and essentially was going to be Vox Machina's way of being free of any sort of political issues based on their actions that evening, and after much discussion and preparation and purchasing a lot of mirrors, the party took their transit over to the east-northeast towards Whitestone, where they began to traverse the Alabaster Sierras to the north, using the mountain range as opposed to going directly through the forest. There they managed to avoid encountering a bunch of harpies that were distracted by eating the horses they left behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the castle, this is the town?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And we're at the southern part of that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are actually coming in from what would be the northwestern side of the city

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A little bit further down. About that angle there. That's the direction you're coming in from.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I don't have any free time anymore. (all laugh)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys have been travelling through the forest, and it is a very dense forest, but it is mostly cold-weather trees, pines. And there is, you can see once you get inside the forest, the ground itself is very thick and there are elements of melting snow on the top of the trees, there was recently a snowfall in this area but it seems like it's been a while and most of it has turned to slush and water. You have about two hours of travel into the forest, and you all immediately catch the sound of distant howling.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I say we scope out the hidden entrance, see if it's guarded, see if they've discovered it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: To the town, or to the castle?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The hidden entrance to the castle. Instead of using it, I think we should possibly spend the night and get a view of the town, see if there's anything unusual.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I agree, can we camp out and hide?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Watch from afar? What's that going to tell us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We could send a bird in. Or an invisible gnome.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just to see if the town is normal or not.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It could be all vampires. Or it could be a totally normal town.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If it's all vampires, it'll be empty right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should definitely attack during the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We should send one by air and one by land.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to do that?

preceding_turns.text: Do you want to do that?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You gather that it is strange that they're out. Though it is getting later in the day, you are pushing four or five in the afternoon, the sun is starting to get closer to the horizon. It is strange that they're out this early, you're not sure what the reasoning would be for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Distant howling? Does it sound like wolves? Can I make a nature check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to make a stealth check

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 26. Those are wolves. It sounds like a pack of wolves, probably close to anywhere from five or six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Would I think it's weird that they're howling during the daytime?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, flying takes an hour. So, it's one of those things you could do once you approach it. It'll last you awhile, as opposed to doing it now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long would it take me to fly over if I was a bird?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I ride you into town?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You want me to jog into town?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You could ride me into town.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Man, every time, Scanlan, every time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Could you turn yourself and fly?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I guess I could fly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You wanna go invisible and jump on my back and I can eagle up?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whatever you're into, baby. (laughs) I've become Austin Powers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If the coach driver was any indication, there are going to be people--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What about this  I'll make us both invisible and you fly us in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, get on the ground, not just above.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Now, Invisibility  how long does it last at full duration?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Looking. Up to an hour. Ooh, and it takes two hours just to get there?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So somewhere around six hours, five hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Could you turn yourself and fly?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I guess I could fly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You wanna go invisible and jump on my back and I can eagle up?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whatever you're into, baby. (laughs) I've become Austin Powers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If the coach driver was any indication, there are going to be people--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What about this  I'll make us both invisible and you fly us in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, get on the ground, not just above.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Now, Invisibility  how long does it last at full duration?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Looking. Up to an hour. Ooh, and it takes two hours just to get there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, flying takes an hour. So, it's one of those things you could do once you approach it. It'll last you awhile, as opposed to doing it now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How long can you be Polymorphed for? Forever? Concentration?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For half of my druid level, we discovered.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, about five breathless moments pass as the dogs, wolves all get relatively close. One of them comes up and returns back to the pack. You don't get a good view of the individual that is currently guiding the pack, and you see them disappear between the thick trees in the distance. Make an active perception check for you, Vex, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And they're close to us now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've been doing the dust of tracelessness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So, I'll cast it on us now that they're closer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if that's the ground search party.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So, should we add ten to all of our stealth rolls that had been, or do we have to roll again?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So we're stealthing again in the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because she's casting Pass, or you won't get the benefit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it, let's roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and just add ten to the previous roll. (all cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We want to keep our good rolls.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Best you can tell, you can't tell specific race or details. Then, another minute passes before the barking and the howls fade and the hunting party seems to have been eluded.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We want to keep our good rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, about five breathless moments pass as the dogs, wolves all get relatively close. One of them comes up and returns back to the pack. You don't get a good view of the individual that is currently guiding the pack, and you see them disappear between the thick trees in the distance. Make an active perception check for you, Vex, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is forest? No, you're in forest, now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're sure that's a favored terrain? Then go ahead and roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was worse than the first one, that's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well, you didn't say you were doing it. 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18, okay. It's hard to make out the details at this distance. You check out, it does appear to be a female form.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Give her ten years.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There was no way to get a good look at who it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Do you want to make an active perception check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Normally, if they'd passed by now--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is an 'I love you' for those awful rolls earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That may be its name now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see the female form, it's not someone you particularly recognize. But the woman does appear to be older, probably in her late 40s, early 50s. She has some hunting gear over her shoulder. She has a short bow that's strapped over her, she has a quiver of arrows. She looks like she's hunting for food.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If she was a little older, Tiberius would kill her. (all laugh)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Farmlands look likely to be the largest cluster of people. You can see, since it's getting to the end of the day, there are folks finishing up gathering the crops that were available to them or sort of planting as they go through. And you can see there's about five or six people that are all in one group. Most everyone else seems to be relatively solitary and trying to go about their business as fast as possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Apparently, whenever one of them is moving through, most of the denizens of the town keep a very wide berth, and generally avoid them entirely and go about their business, at a distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Like over all of the entire city. They're pretty well scattered about. After you do a full pass over the city, those are most of the details you can make out at this height. Anything further, any specifics, you want to go for before heading back?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You want to set me down so I can go talk to people?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You want to talk to people?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, or at least eavesdrop. We don't know if they're all vampires or not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like there's a central part where there's a lot of people gathered?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 17. The stonework here is old and you manage to not lose your footing entirely as you bring your way down. Thankfully, you're light enough, and the stones are not too large, so you can get some good handholds. You do, over the next 12 minutes or so, make your way to the base of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a wall. There is a wall on the outskirts of Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You swoop down and you perch on the edge of the wall there. It's about 25 feet up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to walk down there. I won't be able to see you, so I'm going to leave a little--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll keep an-- Oh, wait, I can't see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you can't talk right now, you're an eagle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I leave a little, like a canteen or something, right where she's perched, just so I know where to find her.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, my stein. And then I'm going to walk down and see if I can stealthily eavesdrop on some conversations.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You make your way down the 25-foot wall she's perched on.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit. Am I going to fall?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make an athletics check to climb.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. 15 minutes. After five minutes of eavesdropping you realize that you are not going to make it up that wall, and you feel the magic of your Invisibility illusion about to fade. At this point, by the way, the sun has just hit the edge of the mountains, the sky itself is a vibrant, reddish orange slowly turning to purple and sunset is upon you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them ends up counting the last bit of crop. "That's it, that's all we have. That is the entire pull for the day." And the older gentleman, who is overseeing it, grinds his hands and goes, "Sir Kerrion is going to have my hide."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, wasn't that one of the people--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "At the very least, let's gather it together and hopefully Pelor will protect us." And the people take the carts and begin making their way towards the outer gate on the southeast side of Whitestone, where you guys are currently at.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to hustle back to the roof.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hopefully he lands on his lute.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: There's a weird buzzing vibrational feel as its magic attunes to you over the next hour or so as you're waiting, but you get the sensation that it will offer some decent protection from impeding charm effects.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, the night falls and the crickets begin to emerge, the slow mist begins to form.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, our friends aren't back yet. It's already night and they're not back?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just want to say that I pulled my hood down, and put on my calamari hat, and pulled the hood back over it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you take the partially rusted over, but functional, metallic skull cap that Clarota was wearing when you guys met in the Underdark, that Clarota no longer needs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You place it on your head and it's a little loose. As you place it on, it rattles for a moment, and then it form-fits to your skull. Your hair being pinched beneath it and just emerging from underneath, almost Loki-helmet-style.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A Loki mullet. You start to get really nervous about the arrival of your friends, until eventually you hear the flapping of wings. You look up and you can see, since it has taken an hour to get there, the illusion just fades, both a giant eagle and Scanlan appear in the moonlight, right above the canopy of the forest you guys are close to, and return to the place you were.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you take the partially rusted over, but functional, metallic skull cap that Clarota was wearing when you guys met in the Underdark, that Clarota no longer needs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You place it on your head and it's a little loose. As you place it on, it rattles for a moment, and then it form-fits to your skull. Your hair being pinched beneath it and just emerging from underneath, almost Loki-helmet-style.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a weird buzzing vibrational feel as its magic attunes to you over the next hour or so as you're waiting, but you get the sensation that it will offer some decent protection from impeding charm effects.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It looks like you have a mullet.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Takes about an hour or so, but you manage to pull from the surroundings these really nice, thick spider silk hammocks, that should be able to support your respective weights. Grog is the only one that might be questionable with the sheer amount of weight that is his form.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It looks like you have a mullet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A Loki mullet. You start to get really nervous about the arrival of your friends, until eventually you hear the flapping of wings. You look up and you can see, since it has taken an hour to get there, the illusion just fades, both a giant eagle and Scanlan appear in the moonlight, right above the canopy of the forest you guys are close to, and return to the place you were.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, question. Can you make it look like we're not here with your foliage shit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I drop my Beast Shape, holding onto a branch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we camp up in the tree? So nobody can come towards us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And, as usual, light some sage.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, they probably would've gotten to Whitestone around seven o'clock, and leaving right as the sun had fully set.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, the invisibility faded when he attacked the guard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When I beaned the guard. They should not have been able to see me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not talking about getting past the Briarwoods. I'm talking about getting past the guards that guard their castle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Here's another issue. It's going to take me a minute to do the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I mean, it's one of those things where the longer I do it the better it'll be. I can do it for up to eight hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If I do it for up to eight hours, I enrich the land over half a mile radius, centered on a single point, and the land becomes enriched for a solid year.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to enrich all of the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Question. What time was it when they were doing their little scouting thing they've just told us about? The sun was going down?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You manage to complete three pieces of parchment, roughly page-sized, with your black powder treatment, successfully. The mist rolls in and gets thicker and thicker, to the point where you cannot see the floor of the forest. The little bit of moonlight that manages to make its way through the boughs of the trees trickles through and then vanishes into these slowly-shifting bits of fog. Your breath, every time you exhale, is visible, as the cold night air begins to take. You find yourselves instinctively shivering, as you cannot grow close to each other for heat, nor build a fire. The night, while uncomfortable, you do manage to get an evening's bit of mostly uncomfortable rest, but rest nonetheless. Eventually coming to as the morning sun comes up and heats it up, the fog begins to fade away and burn away. You're at about an hour past sunrise as you all unrestfully come to consciousness as the temperature shift hits. You manage to relieve yourselves of your spider silk-based hammocks and/or tree grasping. Both you and Trinket have found this way of clutching onto the tree. Trinket's used to the wild.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll a tinkering check, just for the sake of a possible epic failure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, it'll scar anything. It just creates a very high heat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While the rest of you end up taking your evening's rest, Grog, you immediately snap your hammock and fall 15 feet to the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But you manage to make your way up there and just bear hug the tree trunk for rest. You're used to sleeping in uncomfortable situations.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I throw five or six pine cones at his head.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's about seven, 7 30 in the morning.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Concentrating on Pike-- about two minutes of hard concentration. There's no connection.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's about seven, 7 30 in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a quick scry back to the poo jar that I left back in our kitchen?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just to make sure that our home base is okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take a moment and concentrate on the kitchen. At this point in time, you can see early morning. Laina is currently in there, yawning, and is cleaning about and starting to make a small breakfast for all the guards. You can hear in the distance, some conversation in the distant room. It appears to be a couple of your various employed mercenaries having a conversation as she's making breakfast.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I knock that one off, and I'll try for Pike.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys are awake. After this discussion, I'd say it's about 8:00 in the morning. 8:30.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Before we go marching in there, finding an abode to live in is not going to be too difficult. We'll need food.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're not going to be there for long.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have food rations. We have options.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We might be there for days and days.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We also have to go around town and, forgive me if I'm going too far with your plan here, but aren't we trying to win allies among the people?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But we'll need to communicate with them. How?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on. Drop your pants and get with the plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it? Have we gone to sleep, or are we waking up?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 21? You gather these bodies have probably been here for the better part of a week, week and a half? There is some mild decomposition starting to settle in, there is a bit of bloating to some of them. Couldn't have been much longer than that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There wasn't a gnome cleric one there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There was no cleric when we faced them before. All of us who stood against them in Emon.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Body of my guy. Is he sort of handsome?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But, it does mean that it was because of when they saw us in Emon--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it was a child? Oh, god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: -- because Tiberius wasn't here with the crows.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it was because of Emon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So, can we get like a vague idea of how long these people look like they might have been here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Fuck, I'm not good at this shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. It would be advantage on that check for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that, you know, that wasn't bad. Woo!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. I'll say, I'll say it takes the better part of the next hour or so, and you do a little bit of meandering to find it, you guys are being stealthy best you can through alleys and such, but even so you are out in the open, midday, but you are also, you know, under Seeming.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why would they put a warning for us here in the city?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They assumed we would come, but they don't know that we're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Those birds might have told them we were here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This was a week ago, this was before we were even close.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Going to go find something that's a decent distance away from the three noble households, that has a reasonable view of the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That would probably be somewhere in this vicinity here, as the three main houses are right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Something with a second-floor view, but with some distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) I'd say make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I look out too, I've been on the lookout for a building the whole time!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You'll have to use the wine; it'll probably kill some of the bacteria. There are wells throughout the towns you see, ground wells that are set in the city. There is no nearby river. The closest river, the one you know about, is about a 30 minute walk south.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But make it not obvious, because it doesn't want to look like we covered the windows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I've watched you pass through solid stone and earth. How long can you do that for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I can burrow us a tunnel right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you get us close to underneath the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's what she's going to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do it right now. I'm going to cast Move Earth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're going to start carving a tunnel--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To the direction of the tree. And I want to be careful, I don't want to damage the roots of the tree at all. So, as I start getting closer, I want to start looking for the roots of the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Easy enough to find old rags; all of them have that stale, musty towel scent to them. You get them a little wet. There's no water here; all the water here has dried out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And disease and frightened. So, feast consumed, you now take your next eight hours--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And, you should have- Ooh! I got two tens!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket can also benefit from this, by the way, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. You are immune to poison, and diseases, and being frightened, and all wisdom saving throws are made with advantage. Feast is awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we do that right before we go see the Briarwoods, also?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Doing that right now, just in case the Briarwoods decide to come say hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Or any of the other terrible people who live in this town because there are terrible people in this town.
